nodes.name: 云雾森林
nodes.summary: 云雾森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联206种鸟类，包括Black guan、Red-faced guan、紫冠雉等206种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Chestnut-capped brushfinch
nodes.summary: Chestnut-capped brushfinch（Chestnut-capped brushfinch，学名 Arremon brunneinucha），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联4个分布地点节点。

nodes.name: Pine–oak forest
nodes.summary: Pine–oak forest是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联32种鸟类，包括Mottled owl、白喉蓝头鹊、小蓝头鹊等32种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 阿苏艾省
nodes.summary: 阿苏艾省是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联9种鸟类，包括Black-winged ground dove、紫颏毛腿蜂鸟、紫巾山蜂鸟等9种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 次生林
nodes.summary: 次生林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联749种鸟类，包括孤䳍、Sickle-winged guan、黑額鳴冠雉等749种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: inornatus: western slope of Ecuador's Andes from southwestern Chimborazo Province south to Azuay Province The chestnut-capped brushfinch inhabits the understory of a variety of humid to wet forest types in the upper tropical and lower temperate zones. In northern Central America these include pine-oak forest and cloudforest at elevations between . In Costa Rica in addition to wet subtropical forest it occurs in mature secondary forest; in elevation it ranges there between . In Panama it mostly occurs above . In Venezuela it ranges between in the Andes and between in the Coastal Range. In Colombia it favors forest with a bamboo understory; it ranges in elevation between . In Ecuador it mostly occurs between and in Peru between and locally to
